title: The Traveler's Songs
content: Kai is a wandering musician who arrived in Springtown during cherry blossom season. He carries his late mother's guitar and a leather journal of lyrics. His songs capture the essence of every place he visits - from northern lights over mountain towns to sunsets in fishing villages. He has written songs inspired by several Springtown residents including Sakura's cherry blossom paintings and Yuki's ancient wisdom. Mio invited him to perform at the Starlight Festival, where he plans to debut 'Starlight Over Springtown,' a melody that captures the town's heartbeat. Kai plays at the local cafe on weekends and is gradually finding reasons to stay in Springtown longer than he's stayed anywhere.
